_meta.source: Screen recording of 'JUSTIN THOMAS 120fps SLOW MOTION DTL IRON GOLF SWING' (GolfswingHD, YouTube), committed as 'Loom Message - 12 June 2026.mp4'
_meta.method: MediaPipe Pose (BlazePose full, tasks-vision 0.10.14) on 17 frames sampled around address/top/impact of one swing; metrics computed with js/metrics.js; ranges are JT's measured mean padded with a coaching tolerance
